'''Kordren''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] who served as a member of the [[Techrats]], along with [[Skeel (Cerean)|Skeel]] and [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

He was named after the Cerean mythological giant [[Kordren]].<ref name="CGC">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Biography==
Kordren was one of the many people who have contributed to the development of advanced technologies on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] and rebelled against their parents' generation. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he joined the [[Techrats]] and would often race his illegal [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] in the [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadel]]. During the incident, Kordren and Skeel lost control over their machines and crashed. While Skeel died on the spot, Kordren was sent to the hospital and died shortly from his injuries.
